data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an additional security layer by requiring a second authentication factor.
data.technical_spec: Users can enable this feature to require a passcode in addition to their phone number for security.

data.title: Real-Time Threat Detection
data.description: Implements systems to detect and mitigate security threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning algorithms to identify unusual patterns and potential breaches.

data.title: Spam and Abuse Monitoring
data.description: Continuously monitors and reduces spam and abusive content.
data.technical_spec: Employs AI and user reports to flag and remove unwanted content or block accounts.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular updates and patches to address vulnerabilities in the application.
data.technical_spec: Follows a rigorous patch management schedule, informed by security audits and vulnerability scans.

data.title: Security Audits and Penetration Testing
data.description: Periodically conducts security audits and penetration tests to assess and improve the system's defenses.
data.technical_spec: Involves external security firms and internal red teams to evaluate security measures and protocols.
